utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Hey Pheebs , could you please not put your feet up on my new ... old sheet ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Ross , where did you get this ? !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh my God , Phoebe , Pottery Barn has ripped off the design of our antique !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Wow ! Oh my God , well if they have ripped off our table ours must be much more than one and fifty dollars !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Well this does not even smell like opium .

emotion_cause.span: 11_this does not even smell like opium .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Of course not , it smells like wine , which you spilled ! And thanks for wrecking my sheet by the way .
